title: I saw the most win thing of all time on TVTropes
display_title: I saw the most win thing of all time on TVTropes
wikitext:
[]: I saw the most win thing of all time on TVTropes.             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Wed Oct 01, 2008 4:08 pm http://tvtropes.org/pmwiki/pmwiki.php/WMG/NeonGenesisEvangelion I'm referring to the Dwarf Fortress theory, specifically. My contribution is the DF version of EVA-01 vs. Sachiel; click the folder next to "Heh heh heh".

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 01, 2008 5:08 pm I LOLed. They even have THIS The last two episodes and End of Evangelion are both parts of the same ending. wrong. (Most of EoTV25 happens during EoE25' but the middle of EoTV25 is what's happening in EoE26' when Shinji is tanged.) /my crazy EoTV-EoE Concurrency beliefs They also have that info about Rebuild wrong. It was Maya complaining about being freaked her out, not Misato. EDIT: Holy shit, they mention Akira and Fem-Kaworu on that page! We're infamous!

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Wed Oct 01, 2008 5:12 pm It's not supposed to be correct, necessarily. The point of the page is that it's just tropers putting their crazy theories forth.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 02, 2008 12:09 am Or they're putting MY crazy theories forth, for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Oct 02, 2008 12:14 am -The Eva Units are made using technology from Cybertron. -The entire cast of the show is in purgatory -Maya is Shinji's half-sister, the result of an affair Gendo had before marrying Yui. -The show is actually a testament to the power of Metal -The entire show takes place in the Lotus Eater Machine at the end of Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann - Angelic Days is the 'real world. The regular Evangelion is actually a fanfiction written by Rei, disgruntled after being dumped by Shinji. SOMEBODY FANWANK THESE IN SERIOUS DETAIL NOW!

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Thu Oct 02, 2008 2:41 am http://www.lostpedia.net It's been done

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 02, 2008 3:19 am CorporalChaos wrote: -The entire cast of the show is in purgatory

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Thu Oct 02, 2008 4:26 am TV Tropes Wiki wrote: Kaworu was cloned from Misato's father * I can't take credit for this theory. Look around on the site evageeks.org for details. o Great, just great; next thing you know, you'll be mentioning fem-Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Thu Oct 02, 2008 4:44 am One of the entries I liked is: Everything in the show is a dream of Pen-Pen the penguin, who is God.

[]:             Quote Post by p06 » Thu Oct 02, 2008 5:57 am The penpen is mightier than the sword.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Thu Oct 02, 2008 9:27 am CorporalChaos wrote: -The entire show takes place in the Lotus Eater Machine at the end of Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Wed Oct 15, 2008 10:20 pm -Pen-Pen is actually a fusion of the soul of Misato's father with a random penguin, caused by the energies of Second Impact. Hm, okay. Misato's Father x Penguin + Second impact =/= Soul fusion. Answer: Misato's Father x Penguin + Second impact = DEAD

[]:             Quote Post by HENRCAST » Thu Oct 16, 2008 1:54 pm this is without a doubt the most hilarious article I've read in a long, long time!

[]:             Quote Post by Super Chris » Thu Oct 16, 2008 8:40 pm CorporalChaos wrote: - Angelic Days is the 'real world. The regular Evangelion is actually a fanfiction written by Rei, disgruntled after being dumped by Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Oct 16, 2008 10:28 pm For anyone who hasn't realized it, the WMG section of TV Tropes is specifically for making up crazy crap for fun (however, some people put actual theories in there not realizing it.) The "actual" NGE article isn't nearly that silly.

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Thu Oct 16, 2008 10:51 pm These are the only things we can grasp onto as we patiently await the next release of RoE...

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Sat Oct 25, 2008 8:13 pm I suggest a new addition: " 'Being tanged' is actually a euphemism for orgasm. " ...Come on! Shinji said that being tanged felt good and all in Episode 25 (and his oh-I'm-so-very-happy face during 26')...and just look at Maya's reaction.

[]:             Quote Post by Logan Payne » Sun Oct 26, 2008 3:20 am We're talking crazy theories? Kawarou is Shinji's old dog's name from when he was 7. He feels guilty for the dog dying. He hallucinated that entire episode and character.

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Mon Oct 27, 2008 5:24 pm Logan Payne wrote: We're talking crazy theories? Kawarou is Shinji's old dog's name from when he was 7. He feels guilty for the dog dying. He hallucinated that entire episode and character.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Oct 27, 2008 6:04 pm Posted in another thread, but more relevant here: CorporalChaos wrote: Its not a nice little subplot, its the backbone of the entire show. See, Gendo is infertile, so Fuyutsuki brought in his old sensei to father his wife's child, because he knew they had sort of hit it off in their college days. So, Gendo played the part of father, but kept Fuyutuski around so he would know his son. Then after Yui was gone, he sent Shinji away, because he developed a fierce anger that he had nothing of his own from Yui except memories. This would explain two things, why Fuyutsuki is nicer to Shinji than Gendo, and Unit-01 having a horn (Gendo was really compensating for something) Evangelion is really just a trashy dark romance story with sci-fi elements.
summary:

My contribution is the DF version of EVA-01 vs. Sachiel; click the folder next to "Heh heh heh".

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star
